targets.expr: sum by(deployer_name, deployer_ip) (network_listener_handshakes_blocked_total{deployer_name=~"$Validator", deployer_region=~"$Region"}) or on(deployer_name, deployer_ip) (0 * sum by(deployer_name, deployer_ip) (network_tracker_directory_tracked{deployer_name=~"$Validator", deployer_region=~"$Region"}))

sum by(deployer_name, deployer_ip) (engine_indexer_queue_tip{deployer_name=~"$Validator", deployer_region=~"$Region"}) - sum by(deployer_name, deployer_ip) (engine_indexer_queue_floor{deployer_name=~"$Validator", deployer_region=~"$Region"})

sum by(deployer_name, deployer_ip) (rate(runtime_storage_buffer_pool_buffer_pool_exhausted_total_total{deployer_name=~"$Validator", deployer_region=~"$Region"}[$__rate_interval])) or on(deployer_name, deployer_ip) (0 * sum by(deployer_name, deployer_ip) (runtime_storage_buffer_pool_buffer_pool_created{deployer_name=~"$Validator", deployer_region=~"$Region"}))

sum by(deployer_name, deployer_ip) (rate(runtime_network_buffer_pool_buffer_pool_oversized_total_total{deployer_name=~"$Validator", deployer_region=~"$Region"}[$__rate_interval])) or on(deployer_name, deployer_ip) (0 * sum by(deployer_name, deployer_ip) (runtime_network_buffer_pool_buffer_pool_created{deployer_name=~"$Validator", deployer_region=~"$Region"}))
